ac_verdicts.ac_text: Migration creates workflow.agent_invocations and analytics.story_token_usage as partitioned parent tables with RANGE partitioning on started_at and logged_at respectively
PRIMARY KEY includes partition key; FKs drop and recreate with CASCADE (agent_outcomes, agent_decisions) and SET NULL (hitl_decisions) on agent_invocations parent
Unique index on (invocation_id, started_at) created per partition; pgTAP HP-5a verifies index on y2026m03
Data migration uses rename-create-copy-drop strategy within single BEGIN/COMMIT transaction for both tables
DEFAULT partitions created for agent_invocations and story_token_usage; pgTAP HP-2b and HP-3b verify historical rows route to default
Monthly partitions created for current (y2026m03) and next (y2026m04) months; pgTAP HP-2a and HP-3a verify 2026-03-15 routing
Row count verification within migration (sections 8, 16) with RAISE EXCEPTION on mismatch; orphan FK check in section 17; all within transaction
pgTAP test file contains exactly 20 assertions across 8 groups (HP-1 through HP-8); tests run in BEGIN...ROLLBACK for clean state
